name: Ball Sort Game
description: Ball Sort Puzzle - Color Sorting Game Ball Sort Puzzle is a fun and addictive color sorting puzzle game that challenges your brain while keeping you relaxed. Your goal is simple: sort all the colored balls into separate tubes until each tube contains balls of the same color. It starts easy but becomes more challenging as you progress!
instructions: Tap a tube to pick the top ball Tap another tube to move the ball Stack balls of the same color together Complete the level when all colors are sorted
